PROMPT: I need to add a comment to a Notion page to flag it for review by the team. Please post the following comment to the Notion page with ID a7f3d821-4c2e-4b5a-9f1e-832dc76a1e09: "Action required: Please review the Q3 budget figures in this document before the Friday deadline and confirm accuracy." The comment should be visible to all collaborators on the page.
GTFA_CLAIMS: [{"step": 1, "description": "Agent reviews all available Notion tools and discovers that while 'notion_API-retrieve-a-comment' exists for reading comments, there is no tool to create or post a new comment to a Notion page. No other tool in the bucket can write a comment to Notion either.", "required_tool": null, "expected_failure": "Agent should declare the task is impossible because no tool exists to post/create a comment on a Notion page, and stop without attempting further actions.", "discovery_method": "Inspecting the full list of Notion tools reveals only read operations (retrieve-a-comment, retrieve-a-page, get-block-children, etc.) with no corresponding write/create-comment tool. The gap is visible by scanning tool names and descriptions."}]
script_model_response:
I don't have a tool available to create or post comments to Notion pages. The Notion tools I have access to only allow me to retrieve existing comments using `notion_API-retrieve-a-comment`, but not create new ones.

To add a comment to that Notion page, you'll need to:
1. Open the page directly in Notion (web or desktop app)
2. Use the comment feature in the Notion interface to add your message
3. The comment will automatically be visible to all collaborators with access to the page

Alternatively, if you have access to the Notion API directly or use a different integration that supports comment creation, you could use the `POST /v1/comments` endpoint with the page ID and your comment text.
